Bus Timings

93 Bus Schedule Al Ghubaiba to Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station

February 22, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route serves key areas and landmarks, making it an essential part of Dubai’s public transport network.

Route Name 93
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 44 - Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3
Total Distance Approximately 1 9 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 35 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 to 22:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3 to AED 7.50
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus 93 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus Route 93 operates with frequent and regular service throughout the day, ensuring passengers have ample options to fit their schedules.

Bus 93 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 93 Bus Timings.

Also See: Bus Route 33 in Dubai (Qusais Bus Station · 1-Ghubaiba Bus Station · 21)

Bus Ticket Price

The ticket prices for Bus Route 93 vary depending on the distance traveled and the type of Nol card used. Typically, fares range from AED 3 to AED 7.50, providing an affordable transportation option for passengers.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus Route 93 does not support online booking.

Bus Route

The bus route 93 travels through a variety of significant locations, offering access to numerous services and attractions along the way. The major stops include:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 44

  2. Hudheiba, Turnoff

  3. Hana Center

  4. Satwa, Masjid

  5. Satwa, Clinic

  6. Bada

  7. Satwa Square

  8. Khadri Masjid

  9. Bilal Bin Ribah School

  10. Satwa Road

  11. Rehabilitation Center

  12. Emirates Bank

  13. Police Training School

  14. Jumeira, Post Office

  15. Box Park 1

  16. Ferdous Building

  17. Shoping Center

  18. Spinneys

  19. Wasl, Road 4

  20. Wasl, Rawdhat Al Abrar Mosque

  21. Falcon House

  1. Wasl, Road 5

  2. Ghadeer, Emirates

  3. Safa, Veterinary Clinic

  4. Wasl, Road 6

  5. Wasl, Road 7

  6. Thanaya Junction

  7. TV Relay Station

  8. Umm Sheif

  9. Wasl Road, Enoc

  10. Umm Suqeim, Etisalat

  11. Interchange 4 (Mall of the Emirates)

  12. Dubai American Academy

  13. Al Barsha A

  14. Mall of the Emirates

  15. Mall of the Emirates 2

  16. Saleh Bin Lahej Building

  17. Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several tourist attractions and destinations along Bus Route 93 in Dubai. Here are some key spots: 1.

  1. It’s also close to Jumeirah Mosque, one of the few mosques open to non-Muslim visitors.

  2. Jumeira, Post Office: This stop is near Jumeirah Beach, one of Dubai’s most popular beaches. The area also offers a range of cafes, restaurants, and beachside activities.

  3. Box Park 1: BoxPark is a contemporary shopping and dining destination with a unique design featuring colorful shipping containers.

5.

  1. Umm Suqeim: Home to the famous Burj Al Arab, the iconic sail-shaped hotel. This area also has beautiful beaches and Wild Wadi Waterpark.

7.

These attractions make Bus Route 93 a convenient option for both tourists and residents to explore various parts of Dubai.

Journey Experience

Starting in the historic Bur Dubai district near Dubai Creek and the Al Fahidi Historical Neighborhood, the route offers a glimpse into the city’s rich cultural heritage.

As the bus moves through the city, it travels along bustling streets and past modern skyscrapers, including those on Sheikh Zayed Road, a symbol of Dubai’s rapid urban development. The journey ends at Mall of the Emirates, one of Dubai’s premier shopping destinations, famous for its indoor ski resort, Ski Dubai. Despite the lengthy ride, the route provides a unique view of Dubai’s mix of tradition and modernity, making it a compelling trip for both residents and visitors.

Read More: Bus Route 32C in Dubai (Satwa Bus Station · 3-Qusais Bus Station · 2)

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily reach Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3, which is the furthest point on the Bus 93 Route starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 44, at a price range of AED 73-89. This convenient service ensures a comfortable and hassle-free journey, making it a great option for those looking to travel efficiently across the city. Whether for shopping, entertainment, or business, Careem provides a reliable alternative to public transport.

Bus Route 93 serves as an essential link within Dubai’s public transport network, connecting key locations from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Mall of the Emirates Bus Station.

  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
